name: Sprunki
author: Poki
description: Play Sprunki online In Sprunki you build music by placing characters into empty slots and listening to how their sounds fit together. The more you experiment , the easier it becomes to hearl when a mix sounds right . While it's a playful music game that's easy to experiment with, Sprunki has a secret that changes the tone of every track. Find out what it is at Poki! Build and change music in Sprunki When you play Sprunki, you build a looping track by placing characters into empty slots. You begin by dragging characters into place and listening as the sounds start to match or clash. Most players start with 2-3 characters . As you add more, mixes usually feel crowded at around 4-5. Each character immediately adds one sound to the mix. You can remove or replace any character at any time, and the music updates instantly. Sprunki gives you 20 characters across 4 sound types . Here are the different types of sounds in Sprunki and the characters that make them. Sound type Characters What you hear Beats Orange (Oren), Red (Raddy), Silver (Clukr), Fun Bot, Green (Vineria) Drum hits, repeating percussive patterns Effects Gray, brud (Brown), Garnold (Gold), OWAKCX (Lime), Sky (Blue) High sounds that sit in the background and fill empty space Melodies Mr. Sun, Durple (Purple), Mr. Tree, Simon (Yellow), Tunner (Tan) Tunes, motifs layered over beats Vocals Mr. Fun Computer, Wenda (White), Pinki (Pink), Jevin (Blue) Synthesized vocals and choir-like tones Swapping just 1 character out of a 4-character mix is often enough to change the entire mood of the track. Sometimes a mix suddenly clicks, and you stop changing things just to let it play . Tools to help you experiment Sprunki has 2 basic features : Restart button: You can remove all Sprunkis that you placed by pressing the restart button in the top right of the game Gallery: Here, you can view some art from the creator of the game showing how they created some of the characters There are also 3 character-specific features as we
